title: cyperus thomensis
intro: Cyperus thomensis, also known as East Timor flatsedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae, native to East Timor. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus thomensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Cyperus thomensis typically involve drying the plant material and making it into tea, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
